gist.headline: A tidier hive mind
gist.blurb: We've simplified how our backend looks up AI models and calculates costs. It's a behind-the-scenes cleanup that paves the way for more flexible model options soon!
gist.summary: Refactored the shared model registry to resolve costs directly by public model name, removing the complex ServiceId lookup layer.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup simplifies our billing architecture and prepares the platform for upcoming features without disrupting current behavior.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing files or cleaning up a complex machine. The Nomnom creature eating old 'ServiceId' lookup tables. A tidy, organized retro server room.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, organizing glowing data crystals in a retro server room. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of dusty 'ServiceId' punch cards. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
